title: [Bug]:AsStudio Run Statistics dashboard missing token usage info with VLLM model
body: **Describe the bug** As the pic shown above, the token usage info is empty **To Reproduce** Steps to reproduce the behavior: ```python import asyncio import agentscope from agentscope.agent import ReActAgent, UserAgent from agentscope.model import OpenAIChatModel from agentscope.formatter import OpenAIChatFormatter from agentscope.memory import InMemoryMemory from agentscope.tool import Toolkit, execute_python_code, execute_shell_command agentscope.init(project="Agent", name="Friday", studio_url="http://localhost:3002") async def main(): toolkit = Toolkit() toolkit.register_tool_function(execute_python_code) toolkit.register_tool_function(execute_shell_command) agent = ReActAgent( name="Friday", sys_prompt="You're a helpful assistant named Friday.", model=OpenAIChatModel( model_name="qwen3-coder-30b-a3b-instruct", api_key="", stream=True, client_args={"base_url": ""} ), formatter=OpenAIChatFormatter(), memory=InMemoryMemory(), toolkit=toolkit, ) user = UserAgent(name="user") msg = None while True: msg = await agent(msg) msg = await user(msg) if msg.get_text_content() == "exit": break asyncio.run(main()) ``` **Expected behavior** AsStudio shows the token usage info.

linked_prs.title: Fix: Missing Vllm token usage info
linked_prs.patch:
diff --git a/README_zh.md b/README_zh.md
index 1586effc1c..ca67dacf26 100644
--- a/README_zh.md
+++ b/README_zh.md
@@ -366,7 +366,7 @@ as_studio
 
 ## ⚖️ 许可
 
-AgentScope 基于 Apache License 2.0发布。
+AgentScope 基于 Apache License 2.0 发布。
 
 ## 📚 论文

ai_judgment.response:
Yes.

Explanation: The issue concerns missing token usage information when using a specific LLM provider (VLLM model) in an agent system. This relates to LLM operation issues, specifically token usage misconfiguration or incorrect model output handling, both of which are agent issue categories.
